brief_justification: Wrong answer (bookshelf instead of bell stand) — failed to model Rinchen's false belief about the bell's location mapping to prayer book location; Goes one level deep by considering Rinchen's observational state but misapplies the theory of mind; Implicitly rechecks by noting Rinchen was oblivious but doesn't question whether the 'rightful place' framing is the right lens; Mentions what Rinchen could observe but doesn't verify against all location changes; Presents conclusion with some hedging but no structured uncertainty; Mentions prayer table as alternative but dismisses it without considering bell stand; Shows reasoning chain from premises to conclusion but the premises themselves are wrong.
